message:
fix(macros): skip nested function items in scope return-span visitor

The return_span() visitor in the scope proc-macro already skipped
closures and async blocks to avoid false positives on inner returns.
However, it did not skip nested fn items (e.g., helper functions
defined inside a scope body), causing their return statements to be
incorrectly flagged as scope-body returns.

Add visit_item_fn() override that stops traversal into nested function
definitions, matching the existing closure/async block behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
